channel.title: BUhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: If Intermittent Fasting Isn't Working for You, Science Says You're Not Alone
item.description: A new study says intermittent fasting isn't the weight-loss hack we thought

item.title: Still Skipping Oatmeal? Here's Why You Might Want to Reconsider
item.description: How a simple bowl of oatmeal can support your cholesterol

item.title: What Is Coconut Sugar? Here's The Deal On This Cane Sugar Alternative
item.description: If you're eager to sample some other sweet options besides cane sugar, coconut sugar may be a healthy alternative.

item.title: A Neurologist-Approved Trick For Using Technology More Mindfully
item.description: A simple suggestion to "reduce your screen time" might not be possible (or effective) for everyone.

item.title: Watching This On TV May Actually Boost Your Well-Being, Study Finds
What Happens When Blood Sugar Falls Too Low
7 Nutrition Red Flags to Know About
item.description: Feeling unusually tired or noticing subtle changes in hair, nails, mood, or appetite? These signs may indicate nutrition gaps worth discussing with yo...

item.title: Tips for Making Exercise a Daily Habit
